creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text: They were quickly fixed once reported, this patch has also been up for almost a month now so if you have concerns feel free to test (which is always welcomed) and report. We have also as I've mentioned previously upstreamed patches and reported issues which hasn't occurred for years and there are also more people working on improving libxml2's build frameworks both Autotools and CMake (they're also much closer now in upstream repo) even if CMake recieves more attention right now as of recent.
